safest_plan.stop_basis: No source gave a structure-based invalidation level, so no stop can be placed safely

stance_by_source.summary: A single passing grade (8/10) flagging a buy around $5, but with no target or stop attached.

plain_english: Only one source has spoken on Zed, and it gives a thumbs-up to buying near $5 but offers no profit target and no level that would tell you the idea is wrong. With nothing to size a stop or a reward against, this is a one-source tip rather than a tradeable plan. Wait for a second view or a clear exit level before committing money.
